Prepare yourself

Standing Forward Fold

Tests posterior chain mobility — hamstrings, calves, lower back.

🧘

Film from the side. Spine curve and leg angle are the key data.

  • Stand with feet hip-width apart, toes pointing forward
  • Inhale to lengthen your spine tall
  • Exhale and fold forward from the hips — not the waist
  • Let arms hang heavy. Don't force the depth
  • Hold your deepest comfortable position for 5–8 slow breaths
Perform the movement
